infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DeTour records audio during SOS emergencies to send to local authorities.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DeTour uses your location during SOS emergencies to share your GPS coordinates with local authorities.
